name: lrx-monorepo
description: Averrow Platform Monorepo — AI-first threat intelligence & brand protection

overridesNotes._: Rationale for each pnpm.overrides entry (D3 dep-hygiene). pnpm forbids comment keys inside overrides, so notes live here. Drop a pin once the upstream dep resolves the fix within our semver range.
overridesNotes.protocol-buffers-schema: moderate (prototype pollution, <3.6.1). Browser-shipped in the averrow-ops SPA bundle via deck.gl>@deck.gl/carto>pbf>resolve-protobuf-schema. No non-major direct-dep bump exposes the fix, so pin the transitive to the patched patch release.
